prompt: Create a warm, detailed anime-style illustration of a cozy manga artist's workspace at golden hour. Show a young female artist with dark brown hair tied in a messy bun, wearing a loose white T-shirt, seated at a wooden desk in right profile and drawing with a stylus on a Wacom-style pen tablet; place a large solid rectangular privacy blur/censor block over her face. The desk should be crowded but orderly: exactly 2 computer monitors, with the left monitor showing a digital manga page in drawing software containing 2 black-and-white panels and speech bubbles, and the rear monitor showing character design sheets; exactly 1 framed portrait on a small easel between the monitors, also with a smaller rectangular privacy blur over the face; exactly 1 keyboard, 1 mouse, 1 desk lamp with an articulated arm casting warm light, 1 stylus in her hand, 1 pen tablet, 1 pen cup, 2 loose pens on the desk, 2 loose erasers, 1 stack of manga/reference books, and several loose manga manuscript pages. In the background, include wooden bookshelves filled with manga volumes, art books, jars, pencils, and exactly 3 small anime figurines on the shelves: two girl figurines on the left shelf and one boy figurine on the right shelf. Add exactly 2 pinned manga drawings on the left wall, one single portrait sheet and one comic layout sheet. On the right side, include a softly glowing window with beige curtains and sunlight streaming in. Use delicate floating sparkles and dust motes throughout the room, soft rim light on the artist's hair and shoulders, pastel browns and creams, intricate linework, cinematic depth, high-detail digital painting, nostalgic shoujo manga studio atmosphere. Include subtle Japanese-style manga book spines and magazine covers without requiring legible text. The mood should feel peaceful, creative, and intimate, like an artist working late afternoon in her personal studio.
